title: Thappa Dhaan Theriyum Lyrics Maari Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Maari Thappa Dhaan Theriyum Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Anirudh Ravichander, Dhanush, Chinna Ponnu & Magizhini
Manimaaran
Lyrics: Dhanush

Thappa Dhaan Theriyum
namma route-u,
sariyaana payanlaam
get out-u.

Konjam wronga thaan irukum
aana right-u
puriyaadha varaikkum
appeettu.

Indha ooroda lightu
maari the great-u
police-eh adichadhu
da salute-u!!

Nee irundhaa thaan correctu
illaina reveetu
inimethaan nalla neram
is-start-u.

Guniyum podhu
kuththum oorukulla,
nimirdhe thaan
nadakkanum valiye illa.

Thona thaedi
vinai thaedum ulagathula.
thaniyaave irundhaalum
thappe illa.

Summa yedhaachum
sollaadha kannu.
inga irukkum ellorum
eppodhum onnu.

Unakku right-nu
pattadha mattum pannu.
ippo vandhu en veetula
vairraara thinnu.

Thappa Dhaan Theriyum
namma route-u,
sariyaana payanlaam
get out-u.

Konjam wronga thaan irukum
aana right-u
puriyaadha varaikkum
appeettu.

Indha ooroda lightu
maari the great-u
police-eh adichadhu
da salute-u!!

Nee irundhaa thaan correctu
illaina reveetu
inimethaan nalla neram
is-start-u.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Thappa Dhaan Theriyum conveys a sense of confidence and fun, emphasizing the importance of enjoying life despite its challenges.

How does this song fit into the movie plot?

In Maari, this song reflects the protagonist's carefree attitude and his interactions with the world around him.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features vocals by Dhanush, Chinna Ponnu, and Magizhini Manimaarran.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for Thappa Dhaan Theriyum were penned by Dhanush himself.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 8, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thappa Dhaan Theriyum, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree spirit of the protagonist in Maari. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The song's playful nature encourages listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm. Overall, it serves as a reminder to enjoy the journey, regardless of the obstacles faced.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thappa Dhaan Theriyum from Maari is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Dhanush and Chinna Ponnu. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere that is perfect for any party. Dive into this lively track that showcases the unique flair of Tamil cinema's musical landscape!
stanzaMeanings: Our route is the right one, so let's get out with the right people.
There might be some wrong things, but until the right is understood, let's keep going.
The lights of this town salute the great police who have come here!
Only if you are here is it correct; otherwise, the good times will start only later.
In this town, when the gun goes off, it should be the right way, not just any way.
In this world, seeking the right path will lead to good outcomes. Even if alone, it's not wrong.
Don't just say anything randomly. Everyone here is always united.
Only do what you think is right. Now, come and eat at my house.
I came alone and will leave alone; I don't need any attachments.
If you come talking sweetly, it will go well; otherwise, it won't.
Our route is the right one, so let's get out with the right people.
There might be some wrong things, but until the right is understood, let's keep going.
The lights of this town salute the great police who have come here!
Only if you are here is it correct; otherwise, the good times will start only later.
